title: Transform — change every item
objectives: Recognize a loop that appends an operation-of-iterator with no branch
Transfer: spot which pattern a new snippet uses

blocks.content: TRANSFORM maps every item into a new collection. There is no keep/skip branch — every iteration appends a computed value.
Canonical example: `double_all` from fixtures/transform. Next: open Decode and paste a fresh loop to name its pattern.

checks.prompt: Which line appends the transformed value?
